title: The Actress
writer: Arthur Wing Pinero, Joseph Farnham, Albert Lewin
actors: Norma Shearer, Owen Moore, Gwen Lee
plot: A theatrical troupe from the west end of London loses its leading lady (Rose Trelawny) when she goes off to marry a rich young man from the other side of town (Arthur Gower). The rest of the play deals with the budding romance and...
